description: CANDIDATE / DRAFT, non-normative (RUN-LEX-01 EXP-LEX-04). The holder-stapled inclusion proof handed to a verifier alongside a credential: the leaf commitment, its RFC-6962 audit path and position, the strongRef to the signed tree head, and the strongRef to the holder binding. The verifier checks it with ZERO callback to the issuer. `alg` is a CLOSED enum (contrast the calendar lexicons' OPEN knownValues) — a value outside it is invalid, the T-AT6.1 / matchup Row 3 distinction expressed in a schema.

alg.description: The issuer's CID-first signature suite. CLOSED enum — the base spec's three blessed curves.

commitment.description: The credential's keyed commitment (the tree leaf).

head.description: strongRef to the signed community.lexicon.attest.treeHead record.

binding.description: strongRef to the issuer-signed community.lexicon.attest.holderBinding record.
